answers.text: {"summary": "针对选中的加热器-分离器系统，基于三条错误诊断生成三个候选编辑：补全加热器进料流率规格（中风险）、补全分离器固定压力操作目标（中风险）、为分离器气相出口添加下游连接占位（高风险拓扑修改）。", "issues": [{"code": "STREAM_SPEC_MISSING", "severity": "error", "message": "Charge Heater Feed 缺少流率规格，导致求解器无法建立物料平衡。", "citations": ["diag-2", "flowdoc-stream-1", "snapshot-1"]}, {"code": "UNIT_PARAMETER_INCOMPLETE", "severity": "error", "message": "Hot Flash Separator 配置为固定压力模式但缺少操作压力目标值。", "citations": ["diag-3", "flowdoc-unit-2", "snapshot-1"]}, {"code": "STREAM_DISCONNECTED", "severity": "error", "message": "Separator Vapor 71 未连接任何下游单元，形成拓扑断点。", "citations": ["diag-1", "flowdoc-stream-3", "snapshot-1"]}], "proposed_actions": [{"action_id": "edit-001", "type": "candidate_edit", "title": "补全 Charge Heater Feed 流率规格", "target": {"kind": "stream", "id": "feed-71", "name": "Charge Heater Feed"}, "rationale": "诊断指出 feed-71 缺少流率规格，需添加 mass_flow_kg_h 或 molar_flow_kmol_h 占位以允许求解器建立物料平衡。", "patch": {"spec_placeholders": {"mass_flow_kg_h": {"value": null, "unit": "kg/h", "description": "待填：设计进料质量流率"}}}, "risk_level": "medium", "requires_confirmation": true, "citations": ["diag-2", "flowdoc-stream-1", "snapshot-1"]}, {"action_id": "edit-002", "type": "candidate_edit", "title": "补全 Hot Flash Separator 固定压力目标值", "target": {"kind": "unit", "id": "separator-7", "name": "Hot Flash Separator"}, "rationale": "诊断指出分离器配置为 fixed 压力模式但缺少 operating_pressure_kpa 参数，需补全以匹配入口流 176 kPa 或设定设计值。", "patch": {"parameter_updates": {"operating_pressure_kpa": {"value": 176, "unit": "kPa", "source": "inferred_from_inlet_stream_heater-outlet-71"}}}, "risk_level": "medium", "requires_confirmation": true, "citations": ["diag-3", "flowdoc-unit-2", "snapshot-1"]}, {"action_id": "edit-003", "type": "candidate_edit", "title": "为 Separator Vapor 71 添加下游连接占位", "target": {"kind": "stream", "id": "separator-vapor-71", "name": "Separator Vapor 71"}, "rationale": "诊断指出该流为悬空出口，需添加 connection_placeholder 指向待建下游单元（如冷凝器或压缩机），属于拓扑扩展建议。", "patch": {"connection_placeholder": {"target_unit_id": "TO_BE_DEFINED", "suggested_kinds": ["Condenser", "Compressor", "ProductSink"], "rationale": "vapor_phase_disposition_required"}}, "risk_level": "high", "requires_confirmation": true, "citations": ["diag-1", "flowdoc-stream-3", "snapshot-1"]}], "confidence": 0.85, "requires_confirmation": true}

issues.message: Separator Vapor 71 is not connected to any downstream consumer or export sink.
Charge Heater Feed is missing flow rate specification.
Hot Flash Separator is configured for fixed pressure mode but the operating pressure target is missing.
Hot Flash Separator vapor interpretation still depends on the upstream feed gap and heater outlet condition.

proposed_actions.title: 为 separator-vapor-71 预留下游重连占位
proposed_actions.rationale: 当前断链问题只能通过人工确认后续去向来处理，因此 patch 仅保留候选连接占位。

proposed_actions.title: 为 feed-71 补充缺失规格占位
proposed_actions.rationale: 当前诊断已明确指出该流股规格不完整，因此更合适的是补局部规格占位，而不是给整图 patch。

proposed_actions.title: 为 separator-7 补充局部参数占位
proposed_actions.rationale: 当前诊断集中在局部参数或配置完整性，因此更合适的是输出可审查的局部参数占位提案。

citations.label: 诊断 STREAM_DISCONNECTED
citations.excerpt: Separator Vapor 71 is not connected to any downstream consumer or export sink.

citations.label: 诊断 STREAM_SPEC_MISSING
citations.excerpt: Charge Heater Feed is missing flow rate specification.

citations.label: 诊断 UNIT_PARAMETER_INCOMPLETE
citations.excerpt: Hot Flash Separator is configured for fixed pressure mode but the operating pressure target is missing.

citations.label: 诊断 DOWNSTREAM_STATE_DEPENDENT
citations.excerpt: Hot Flash Separator vapor interpretation still depends on the upstream feed gap and heater outlet condition.
